cases_verified: Case B: dirty repo, no waiver → ProvenanceError (promotion blocked)
Case C: dirty repo + explicit waiver → promotion_permitted=true, waiver recorded
Case D: artifact validation (clean, waived, missing, blocked, repaired)
Retroactive: carbonx Batch 74 would have been blocked without waiver
doctrine: Behavioral truth is not enough. Source-control truth must agree. Audit truth must say exactly when they diverged and how they were repaired.
